symptoms: All endpoint p99 latencies jumped to exactly 30 000 ms
Requests that previously failed fast at 3 s now hold threads for 30 s
DB connection pool exhausted as long-running queries held connections open
Kubernetes: gateway-api HPA scaling to max replicas (50) but not recovering
Error budget: 9% of monthly SLO budget consumed in 50 minutes
confirmed_root_cause: The NGINX config change placed proxy_read_timeout 30s in the http {} block instead of inside the location /api/v2/recommendations {} block
resolution_action: Rolled back nginx.conf to previous configmap version via kubectl rollout undo and applied corrected config with timeout scoped inside the specific location block
